title: Large Outbound Data Exfiltration
description: Detects large outbound data transfers from internal hosts to external destinations (QFlow). Requires Network Flow.
author: SOC Team
aql: SELECT sourceip, COUNT(*) AS hits FROM flows WHERE NOT INCIDR('10.0.0.0/8', destinationip) AND NOT INCIDR('192.168.0.0/16', destinationip) GROUP BY sourceip HAVING SUM(sourcebytes) >= 524288000 ORDER BY hits DESC LAST 1 HOURS
